1. All code must be very high quality: No code duplication, no code that is not used, use functional decomposition with descriptive variable and function names and functions that do one thing and are short and easy to read and maintain.
2. Don't write comments that simply state what the code does. Only include comments that explain why something is done the way it is. But only if this isn't self explanatory with the context the code itself provides.
3. This code is for a WoW Classic addon.
